## Checklist

- [ ] My changes don't reduce the completeness of requirement extraction
- [ ] Any new fields or categories are genuinely standard in regulatory practice (not invented)
- [ ] I've tested this with a real regulatory document (or described why I couldn't)
- [ ] I haven't removed or changed the license or attribution
- [ ] My changes work across industries (not hardcoded to a specific jurisdiction)
